coreResponsibility.summary: A Kaltura Player plugin that integrates NPAW's Youbora CDN Balancer (SmartSwitch) to dynamically select the optimal CDN for video playback based on real-time network conditions and CDN performance metrics.

featureOwnership: Response timeout handling for CDN decisions
dataHandling: CDN balancer API response parsing (providers list with URLs and scores)
SmartSwitch configuration state (accountCode, application, domainUrl, optionalParams)

upstream.name: NPAW Youbora CDN Balancer API
upstream.description: External API that returns ranked CDN providers based on the playback resource URL

upstream.name: Kaltura Backend / Entry Provider
upstream.description: Provides the original playback source URLs via SOURCE_SELECTED event

downstream.name: playkit-js / kaltura-player-js
downstream.description: Core player engine that consumes the CDN-optimized playback URL

downstream.name: Video playback engines (HLS.js, Shaka Player, etc.)
downstream.description: Receives the modified source URL for actual media loading

entryPoints.description: Plugin registration entry point - registers 'smartswitch' plugin with Kaltura Player
Core plugin class extending BasePlugin - handles CDN balancer API calls and configuration
Engine decorator that intercepts load() to substitute CDN-optimized URLs

configurationFiles.description: TypeScript/Flow type definitions for plugin configuration

errorPatterns: Timeout reached * seconds, loading original source
